question: How is chart[X,start,end] updated in the algorithm?
predicted_answer:
In the algorithm, `chart[X,start,end]` is updated using the following formula:

\[ \text{chart}[X,\text{start},\text{end}] \min= \text{weight}(R) + \text{chart}[Y,\text{start},\text{mid}] + \text{chart}[Z,\text{mid},\text{end}] \]

This update occurs for each rule \( R \) of the form \( X \rightarrow Y \, Z \).
